description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in a short-sleeved, vertically striped sports jersey with a number and name on the back, paired with knee-length athletic shorts and fitted leggings. The figure stands with arms slightly outstretched, displaying a casual, athletic build. He wears low-top sneakers and has a distinctive hairstyle with long hair tied up in a high ponytail. The facial features are stylized, and the figure has a short beard and mustache. The jersey is reminiscent of a soccer uniform, suggesting a sporty or urban context. The overall appearance is that of a young adult, likely in a relaxed or recreational setting.
description: A stylized adult male in a striped sports jersey, athletic shorts, leggings, and sneakers, with a high ponytail and casual athletic build.
description_view_0: Front view showing the striped jersey, facial features, and outstretched arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile, ponytail, and the fit of the shorts and leggings.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the jersey number and name, as well as the ponytail from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, arm, and leg details similar to the left side.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic jersey, knee-length athletic shorts, fitted leggings
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
attribute_hairstyle: long hair tied in a high ponytail
